positive: A cozy, aesthetic scene depicting a steaming mug of coffee resting on a window sill next to a stack of vintage books. Outside the window, it is raining heavily, creating beautiful bokeh effects on the wet glass. The interior is dimly lit by a warm, soft lamp glow, emphasizing the 'hygge' feeling. Style: Cinematic photography, macro details, moody lighting, muted color palette, analog film grain, depth of field, photorealistic, cozy vibes, editorial illustration, Hasselblad quality, 4k resolution.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, harsh edges, cartoon, graffiti, oversaturated, cluttered, distracting
